title: Umami Chewy Japanese Celery Stir-fry
description: A dairy-free-friendly weeknight dish featuring crispy celery slices baked with umami-rich flavors to achieve a chewy texture.
instructions: Chop celery into thin, bite-sized pieces.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger paste, and mirin (if using). Stir in garlic powder and salt.
Toss the celery with the marinade mixture until well coated. Spread evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes or until edges start to crisp up.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top of the celery during the last 2-3 minutes of cooking time for an extra crunch and umami flavor.
Remove from oven once done. Let cool slightly before serving.
